# Internet Archive 1729 Scan Backup

The local 1729 scan resources must not be deleted. They are retained for historical verification, difficult readings, printed page references, and image checks.

The original downloads remain under:

- `E:\Download\bim_eighteenth-century_principia-english-th_newton-sir-isaac_1729_1`
- `E:\Download\bim_eighteenth-century_principia-english-th_newton-sir-isaac_1729_2`

The organized project archive remains under:

- `E:\Codex\Newton_course\sources\external\motte_1729`

These scans are not the routine extraction workflow. When using a scan for verification, record the exact volume, scan leaf or PDF page, printed page when available, and file name.
